summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 5 - Owner Onboarding / Digital Acceptance Flow. Backend: 18/20 tests passed (2 skipped due to token invalidation). Frontend: All UI features verified working. Public onboarding page, internal monitor, and Manager Queue Onboarding tab all functional.

venue_manager_login.detail: venuemanager@venuloq.in / test123 logs in successfully with role 'venue_manager'

onboarding_status_venue_manager.detail: Venue Manager can access onboarding status endpoint

onboarding_status_has_timeline.detail: Status returns timeline data: issued_at, sends, viewed_at, accepted_at

view_returns_owner_safe_data.detail: View endpoint returns only owner-safe data (no acquisition_id, history, created_by)

venue_manager_can_send.detail: Venue Manager can send onboarding link

send_requires_valid_channel.detail: Send requires at least one valid channel (whatsapp, email)

already_completed_shows_success.detail: Already-accepted token shows success/completion state with venue name, signer, terms version

invalid_token_shows_error.detail: Invalid/expired token shows 'Invalid Link' error state

no_splash_for_onboarding.detail: Splash screen is skipped for /onboarding routes

manager_queue_onboarding_tab.detail: Manager Queue shows 'Onboarding' tab with correct count (3)

onboarding_tab_status_badges.detail: Onboarding tab shows status badges: Link Sent, Declined, Accepted

onboarding_monitor_timeline.detail: OnboardingMonitor shows timeline: Link Generated, Link Sent, Owner Viewed, Owner Accepted

onboarding_monitor_send_history.detail: OnboardingMonitor shows send history with channels

onboarding_monitor_acceptance_record.detail: OnboardingMonitor shows acceptance record: signer, date, terms version

manager_detail_onboarding_cta.detail: ManagerApprovalDetail shows 'View Onboarding Monitor' CTA for onboarding-status venues

critical_code_review_comments: onboarding.py: Well-structured with public (view/accept/decline) and internal (send/status) endpoints, proper token validation and expiry handling
OwnerOnboardingPage.js: Clean mobile-first design with venue summary, plain-language terms, consent checkboxes, and digital acceptance flow
OnboardingMonitor.js: Comprehensive internal view with timeline, send history, acceptance record, and resend panel
ManagerQueue.js: Correctly implements 4 tabs (Pending, Approved, Onboarding, Rejected) with comma-separated status filter
ManagerApprovalDetail.js: Shows 'View Onboarding Monitor' CTA for approved/onboarding-status venues
App.js: Correctly skips splash screen for /onboarding routes and hides CustomerOnlyUI (chatbot, compare bar)

test_acquisitions.viewed_invalidated: acq_96bd550290e2 - token was invalidated by resend

seed_data_creation: Used existing test acquisitions with known tokens
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Owner Onboarding fully tested. Routes: /onboarding/:token (public), /team/field/onboarding/:acqId (internal). Public endpoints: view, accept, decline. Internal endpoints: send, status. Manager Queue has 4 tabs including Onboarding. ManagerApprovalDetail shows onboarding CTA for approved/onboarding-status venues. Splash screen skipped for /onboarding routes. WhatsApp dispatch is MOCKED (generates wa.me link only). Email dispatch is MOCKED (records channel but doesn't send).

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp message dispatch (generates wa.me link only)
Email dispatch (records channel but doesn't send)
